options.title: environment.persistence
options.description:
A set of persistent storage location submodules listing the
files and directories to link to their respective persistent
storage location.

Each attribute name should be the full path to a persistent
storage location.

For detailed usage, check the <link
xlink:href="https://github.com/nix-community/impermanence">documentation</link>.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.allowTrash
options.description: Whether to allow newer GIO-based applications to trash files.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories
options.type: list of ((submodule) or string convertible to it)
options.description: Directories to bind mount to persistent storage.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories.*.allowTrash
options.description: Whether to allow newer GIO-based applications to trash files.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories.*.directory
options.description: The path to the directory.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories.*.group
options.description:
If the directory doesn't exist in persistent
storage it will be created and owned by the
group specified by this option.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories.*.hideMount
options.description:
Whether to hide bind mounts from showing up as
mounted drives.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories.*.mode
options.description:
If the directory doesn't exist in persistent
storage it will be created with the mode
specified by this option.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories.*.persistentStoragePath
options.description:
The path to persistent storage where the real
file or directory should be stored.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.directories.*.user
options.description:
If the directory doesn't exist in persistent
storage it will be created and owned by the user
specified by this option.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.enable
options.description: Whether to enable this persistent storage location.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.enableWarnings
options.description: Enable non-critical warnings.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.files
options.type: list of ((submodule) or string convertible to it)
options.description: Files that should be stored in persistent storage.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.files.*.file
options.description: The path to the file.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.files.*.method
options.description:
The method used to link to the target file.
`auto' will almost always do the right thing,
thus you should only set this if the default
doesn't work.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.files.*.parentDirectory.persistentStoragePath
options.description:
The path to persistent storage where the real
file or directory should be stored.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.files.*.persistentStoragePath
options.description:
The path to persistent storage where the real
file or directory should be stored.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.hideMounts
options.description: Whether to hide bind mounts from showing up as mounted drives.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.persistentStoragePath
options.description:
The path to persistent storage where the real
files and directories should be stored.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users
options.description:
A set of user submodules listing the files and
directories to link to their respective user's
home directories.

Each attribute name should be the name of the
user.

For detailed usage, check the <link
xlink:href="https://github.com/nix-community/impermanence">documentation</link>.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories
options.type: list of ((submodule) or string convertible to it)
options.description: Directories to bind mount to persistent storage.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories.*.allowTrash
options.description: Whether to allow newer GIO-based applications to trash files.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories.*.directory
options.description: The path to the directory.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories.*.group
options.description:
If the directory doesn't exist in persistent
storage it will be created and owned by the
group specified by this option.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories.*.hideMount
options.description:
Whether to hide bind mounts from showing up as
mounted drives.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories.*.mode
options.description:
If the directory doesn't exist in persistent
storage it will be created with the mode
specified by this option.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories.*.persistentStoragePath
options.description:
The path to persistent storage where the real
file or directory should be stored.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.directories.*.user
options.description:
If the directory doesn't exist in persistent
storage it will be created and owned by the user
specified by this option.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.files
options.type: list of ((submodule) or string convertible to it)
options.description: Files that should be stored in persistent storage.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.files.*.file
options.description: The path to the file.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.files.*.method
options.description:
The method used to link to the target file.
`auto' will almost always do the right thing,
thus you should only set this if the default
doesn't work.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.files.*.parentDirectory.persistentStoragePath
options.description:
The path to persistent storage where the real
file or directory should be stored.

options.title: environment.persistence.<name>.users.<name>.files.*.persistentStoragePath
options.description:
The path to persistent storage where the real
file or directory should be stored.
